outputs.description: Execution ID of the Google Cloud function invocated. GoogleCloudFunctions.Execution.result Result populated for successful execution of a synchronous Google Cloud function. It will not be populated if the Google Cloud function does not return a result through context.
outputs.name: GoogleCloudFunctions.Execution.executionId

outputs.description: Either a system or user-function generated error. Set if the execution was not successful.
outputs.name: GoogleCloudFunctions.Execution.error
